summary: Iteration 16 - Comprehensive E2E Audit Complete. All critical flows tested and working: signup, login, post creation, post deletion (author + admin), admin dashboard with all tabs including new Data Management tab, settings, map search, marketplace, and chat widget.
critical_code_review_comments: FeedPage.js line 438: Delete button correctly shows for author_id match OR is_admin - VERIFIED WORKING
PostCard.js line 89: Fixed to use author_id instead of owner_id, added admin check - VERIFIED WORKING
AdminPage.js: New 'data' tab with cleanup buttons - VERIFIED WORKING
Backend feed.py DELETE endpoint allows admin/owner/moderator to delete any post - VERIFIED WORKING
Backend admin.py cleanup-test-data endpoint with delete_all_posts flag - VERIFIED WORKING
seed_data_creation: Multiple test posts created during testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: All critical bugs from user report are FIXED and VERIFIED: 1) Sign-in flow works - redirects to /feed after login, 2) Post deletion works for both post authors AND admins. New Data Management tab in Admin dashboard has 'Clean Up Test Accounts' and 'Delete ALL Posts' buttons. Map search returns 104+ results for Dallas TX. Chat widget is visible and clickable.

signup_flow.evidence: New user e2e_test_1775190381@test.com registered and redirected to /feed

login_flow.evidence: Admin login with admin@petbookin.com redirects to /feed correctly

logout_flow.evidence: Logout button in settings redirects to landing page

post_creation.evidence: Post created and appeared in feed with 'Post shared!' toast

post_deletion_author.evidence: Delete button visible for post author, deletion works

post_deletion_admin.evidence: Admin can see delete buttons on all posts and delete them

settings_page.evidence: Settings page loads, logout button present

map_page.evidence: Dallas TX search returned 104 veterinarians with map markers

marketplace_page.evidence: Marketplace page loads with search and category filters

chat_widget.evidence: Chat toggle button visible at bottom-right, clickable

user_reported_bugs_status.cant_sign_in_redirects_to_landing: FIXED - Login now correctly redirects to /feed
user_reported_bugs_status.cant_delete_posts: FIXED - Delete button shows for author AND admin, deletion works
